session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root directory /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all results. This is testing a new parallelized Makefile where lint runs in the background while tests run in the foreground. Report whether all checks passed or which ones failed.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run parallelized CI with lint in background and tests in foreground

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 Building erk-dev @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev Downloading pygments (1.2MiB) Downloading aiohttp (1.7MiB) Downloading pydantic-core (2.0MiB) Downloading ruff (10.6MiB) Downloading babel (9.7MiB) Downloading ty (9.6MiB) Downloading mkdocs-material (8.9MiB) Downloading libcst (2.2MiB) Downloading mkdocs (3.7MiB) Downloaded aiohttp Downloaded pydantic-core Downloaded mkdocs Downloaded pygments Downloaded libcst Built erk-dev @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev Downloaded ty Downloaded ruff Downloaded babel Downloaded mkdocs-material Installed 78 packages in 364ms Building erkbot @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erkbot Downloading cryptography (4.3MiB) Downloading claude-agent-sdk (67.6MiB) Built erkbot @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erkbot Downloaded cryptography Downloaded claude-agent-sdk Installed 20 packages in 14ms make: *** [Makefile:104: fast-ci] Error 1
... [128 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
Make fast-ci failed with exit code 2. Let me parse the results:
## Results Summary
**Overall Status: FAILED**
The parallelized CI command failed due to Prettier formatting issues. Here's the detailed breakdown:
### Tests (All Passed)
- **erk (core)**: 5485 passed in 27.67s - **erk-dev**: 136 passed in 5.27s - **erk-statusline**: 112 passed in 1.34s - **erkbot**: 114 passed in 2.17s
**Total tests passed: 5847**
### Lint/Format Checks
- **Lint (ruff)**: All checks passed - **Format Check (ruff)**: 1626 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: FAILED - 2 files have formatting issues: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` - **Markdown Check (AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md)**: PASSED - **Exec Reference Check**: OK - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed
### Failure Reason
The make target failed because Prettier found code style issues in 2 markdown files. These files need to be reformatted by running Prettier with the `--write` flag.
The parallelization worked as intended—lint ran in the background while tests ran in the foreground—but the overall exit code reflects the formatting failure, preventing the CI from completing successfully.
